bead.title: Bench: queue ops parity (axon vs JSONL) on 1100-bead archive
bead.description: Add Go benchmarks for queue ops (ready, blocked, show) against both backends loaded with the current 1100-bead archive scale (or a synthesized fixture matching that shape). Capture baseline numbers for JSONL and axon, then verify axon is at parity or better. Commit baseline numbers as evidence under .ddx/executions/<run-id>/.
bead.acceptance: 1. cli/internal/bead/bench_test.go (or similar) defines Benchmarks for ready/blocked/show against both backends. 2. Fixture loader builds a 1100-bead store. 3. Evidence file under .ddx/executions/<run-id>/perf-results.md records ns/op for both backends and confirms axon ≤ JSONL on each op. 4. If axon is slower, the bead is held open with reason in execute-bead notes — do not declare success.
